delightandflight.name: Delight and Flight
delightandflight.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.
delightandflight.shortDesc: User switches out after damaging the target.

thornwhip.name: Thorn Whip
thornwhip.desc: The target is struck with thick, spiked vines. High critical hit ratio.

dryneedles.name: Dry Needles
dryneedles.desc: The target is struck with a series of 2 to 5 needles from a cactus plant.

cactussmash.name: Cactus Smash
cactussmash.desc: The user slams its spiky cactus into the target to attack. The user also sustains serious damage.

ancientroar.name: Ancient Roar
ancientroar.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.

medusaray.name: Medusa Ray
medusaray.desc: Causes the target to become a Rock type. Fails if the target is an Arceus, or if the target is already purely Rock type.
medusaray.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Rock.

deserttempest.name: Desert Tempest
deserttempest.shortDesc: Summons Sandstorm. Smooth Rock: x1.2 damage.

gorgonfang.name: Gorgon Fang
gorgonfang.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
gorgonfang.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.

jaggedshot.name: Jagged Shot
jaggedshot.desc: This move becomes a physical attack if the user's Attack is greater than its Special Attack, including stat stage changes. Always results in a critical hit.
jaggedshot.shortDesc: Physical if user's Atk > Sp. Atk. Always crits.

rampartsmight.name: Rampart's Might
rampartsmight.shortDesc: The foes' moves target the user. Returns last damage taken at 1.5x power.

retroblast.name: Retro Blast
retroblast.shortDesc: 33% Chance to lower targets Sp. Atk and Sp. Def by 1 stage

lunarianforce.name: Lunarian Force
lunarianforce.shortDesc: If Misty Terrain; nullifies the target's Ability.

gemstoneglimmer.name: Gemstone Glimmer
gemstoneglimmer.desc: Has a 25% chance to lower the target's Accuracy by 1 stage.
gemstoneglimmer.shortDesc: 25% chance to lower the target's Accuracy by 1.

tartantrum.name: Tar-Tantrum
tartantrum.desc: The user throws powerful tar-fists at his foe. It may also lower the foes' Speed stat.
tartantrum.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the target's speed by 1.

pressurize.name: Pressurize
pressurize.desc: The user pressurizes its crystalline body parts, sharply raising its Sp. Def stat.
pressurize.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 2.

vulcanshammer.name: Vulcan's Hammer
vulcanshammer.desc: The foe is struck with a spark generating Hammer. It may leave the target with a burn.

granite.name: Granite
granite.desc: The user sets up a protective reinforcement for their side of the field. Lasts for 3 turns.
granite.shortDesc: Sets Reflect and Light Screen on user's side for 3 turns.

greatbind.name: Great Bind
greatbind.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.

morph.desc: Functions the same as Transform; however, if a Delta species of the target exists, the user will turn into that instead. If the target has multiple Delta Species, it will select one of them at random.
morph.shortDesc: Transforms into the opponent, prioritizes Delta Form.
morph.name: Morph

retrograde.name: Retrograde
retrograde.shortDesc: Reverts Mega Evolved Pokémon back to their base form.

fullheal.name: Full Heal
fullheal.shortDesc: Heals the target to full HP.

groomguard.name: Groom Guard
groomguard.desc: The user protects itself by grooming its thick fur, drastically raising its Sp. Def stat.
groomguard.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 3.

eevoboost.name: Eevoboost
eevoboost.desc: The user slowly gathers its inner potential, uncovering a power that raises all stats.

charmingtweety.name: Charming Tweety
charmingtweety.desc: An earsplitting screech harshly reduces the target's Defense stat.

hotcoals.name: Hot Coals
hotcoals.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Fire type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
hotcoals.shortDesc: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Fire weakness.

wildfire.name: Wildfire
wildfire.desc: Burns the foe. If it is a Grass-type Pokemon, burns all Pokemon in their party weak to fire.
wildfire.shortDesc: Burns the target & possibly target's team.

fierymaelstrom.name: Fiery Maelstrom
fierymaelstrom.shortDesc: Summons Sun. Heat Rock: x1.2 damage.

moltenglaze.name: Molten Glaze
moltenglaze.desc: Hits both foes. Until the target switches out, the effectiveness of Fire-type moves is doubled against it.
moltenglaze.shortDesc: Hits both foes. Makes foes weaker to fire.

flameaxe.name: Flame Axe
flameaxe.desc: Changes foe's Rock-type moves to Fire-type moves for 2 turns.
flameaxe.shortDesc: Changes foe's Rock-type moves to Fire-type for 2 turns.

brutalcalamity.name: Brutal Calamity
brutalcalamity.shortDesc: 2x BP in Trick Room, Wonder Room and Magic Room. Clears Rooms.

smolderdash.name: Smolder Dash
smolderdash.shortDesc: Clears grounded hazards, burns if succesful.

nostrilflare.name: Nostril Flare
nostrilflare.desc: Before the opponent attacks, the user unleashes a quick flame from its nostrils.

pepperbreath.name: Pepper Breath
pepperbreath.desc: A small blast of fire that may leave the foe with a burn.

cinderbreath.name: Cinder Breath
cinderbreath.desc: The foe is blasted with a cloud of hot ash to inflict damage and lower accuracy.
cinderbreath.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.

novablast.name: Nova Blast
novablast.desc: The user unleashes a massive pulse of fire to damage the opponent.

gigadestroyer.name: Giga Destroyer
gigadestroyer.desc: The user unleashes two organic missiles to destroy the foe.

terraforce.name: Terra Force
terraforce.desc: The user hurls a scorching ball of energy that strikes every Pokémon around it.
terraforce.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dig.

sizzleslam.name: Sizzle Slam
sizzleslam.desc: The user headbutts the opponent with an open flame stove atop its head. Leaves the foe burning.
sizzleslam.shortDesc: 100% chance to burn the target. Destroys foe's Berry/Gem.

dragonify.name: Dragonify
dragonify.desc: Causes the target to become a Dragon type. Fails if the target is an Arceus, or if the target is already purely Dragon type.
dragonify.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Dragon.

drakonvoice.name: Drakon Voice
drakonvoice.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.

jetstream.name: Jet Stream
jetstream.desc: For 2 turns, the user and its party members have their Priority increased by 1. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

venomousroar.name: Venomous Roar
venomousroar.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

mistbarrage.name: Mist Barrage
mistbarrage.shortDesc: During Misty Terrain: 1.5x damage instead of half. 10% chance to confuse.

splintercannon.name: Splinter Cannon
splintercannon.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Def by 1.

causticbreath.name: Caustic Breath
causticbreath.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.
causticbreath.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Def and Sp. Def by 1.

sirensong.name: Siren Song
sirensong.shortDesc: Drowsies if target boosted stats. Heals if target is ally.

pressureburst.name: Pressure Burst
pressureburst.shortDesc: Sets Aqua Ring for every Pokemon on user's side.

coralbreak.name: Coral Break
coralbreak.desc: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.
coralbreak.shortDesc: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.

oceanswrath.name: Ocean's Wrath
oceanswrath.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
oceanswrath.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.

nimbusfist.name: Nimbus Fist
nimbusfist.desc: A strike of condensed mist strikes the foe, lowering its accuracy.
nimbusfist.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.

foggystrike.name: Foggy Strike
foggystrike.desc: A quick, concealed strike in a shroud of mist, which cannot be dodged.
foggystrike.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

flashflood.name: Flash Flood
flashflood.desc: The user causes a quick surge of flowing water to drown out the foe. This move always goes first.

fincutter.name: Fin Cutter
fincutter.desc: The user cuts the foe with a sharpened fin. This move is more likely to crit.

tonic.name: Tonic
tonic.desc: The user drains life-force and shares it among your active mons. The power scales with the user's level.
tonic.shortDesc: Does damage equal to the user's level. User recovers 50% of the damage dealt, split among alies.

twingust.name: Twin Gust
twingust.desc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit. In Double Battles, this move attempts to hit the targeted Pokemon and its ally once each. If hitting one of these Pokemon would be prevented by immunity, protection, semi-invulnerability, an Ability, or accuracy, it attempts to hit the other Pokemon twice instead. If this move is redirected, it hits that target twice.
twingust.shortDesc: Hits twice. Doubles: Tries to hit each foe once.

severingwind.name: Severing Wind
severingwind.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit. 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
severingwind.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio. 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1. Hits adjacent foes.

skyfall.name: Sky Fall
skyfall.desc: Has a 30% chance to paralyse the target.

typhoon.name: Typhoon
typhoon.desc: The target is whipped around by a strong typhoon. It may also lower the target's accuracy.
typhoon.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.

gale.name: Gale
gale.desc: The user creates a shockwave eliminating traps and hazards. Raises the user's Speed stat.
gale.shortDesc: Free user from hazards/bind/Leech Seed; +1 Spe.

spiritaway.name: Spirit Away
spiritaway.desc: This attack takes the target into the air with the user on the first turn and executes on the second. The user and the target cannot make a move between turns, but the target can select a move to use. Fails on the first turn if the target is an ally, if the target has a substitute, or if the target is using Bounce, Dig, Dive, Fly, Phantom Force, Shadow Force, or Sky Drop.
spiritaway.shortDesc: User and foe fly up turn 1. Damages on turn 2.

pixietrick.name: Pixie Trick
pixietrick.shortDesc: 0.5x damage if foe isn't holding an item. Swaps items.

faequills.name: Fae Quills
faequills.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times.

meltingaroma.name: Melting Aroma
meltingaroma.desc: Each Pokemon on the user's side restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up, and has its status condition cured.
meltingaroma.shortDesc: User and allies: healed 1/4 max HP, status cured.

sugarglaive.name: Sugar Glaive
sugarglaive.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
sugarglaive.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.

starlightcalling.name: Starlight Calling
starlightcalling.shortDesc: Heals 33%, transform into Tenkibo-Magical-Hero. If Tenkibo-Magical-Hero, 100BP Special move.

faengrush.name: Faeng Rush
faengrush.desc: The user slams the target with a whimsical strike of the fangs. It may make the target flinch.
faengrush.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

excalibur.name: Excalibur
excalibur.desc: The user slashes the enemy using the holy sword, Excalibur. This attack never misses.
excalibur.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

beamshield.name: Beam Shield
beamshield.desc: The user protects itself. This move also damages attackers who make direct contact.
beamshield.shortDesc: Protects from moves. Contact: loses 1/8 max HP.

heavensknuckle.name: Heaven's Knuckle
heavensknuckle.desc: The user blasts a beam of holy energy from their fist. It does not make contact.

dracoblitz.name: Draco Blitz
dracoblitz.desc: The user crashes into the foe at a scorching speed. The user also takes damage and may burn the target.
dracoblitz.shortDesc: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to burn. Thaws user.

fibregraft.name: Fibre Graft
fibregraft.desc: The user faints, and the Pokemon brought out receives the Fighting type, a +1 atk boost, and the effect of Focus Energy. The replacement is sent out at the end of the turn, and the healing happens before hazards take effect.
fibregraft.shortDesc: User faints. Switch-in gains +1 Atk, +2 Crit ratio, + Fighting type.

lycanpounce.name: Lycan Pounce
lycanpounce.shortDesc: High crit ratio. Disguises as the first damaging move in the user's moveset.

groundingstomp.name: Grounding Stomp
groundingstomp.desc: This move's type effectiveness against Poison is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If this move hits a target under the effect of Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, the effect ends. If the target is a Flying type that has not used Roost this turn or a Pokemon with the Levitate Ability, it loses its immunity to Ground-type attacks and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. During the effect, Magnet Rise fails for the target and Telekinesis fails against the target.
groundingstomp.shortDesc: Super effective on Poison. Removes the target's Ground immunity.

dinokick.name: Dino Kick
dinokick.desc: The user kicks the opponent, destroying their item. Does less damage if opponent has no item.
dinokick.shortDesc: 1.5x damage if foe holds an item. Removes item.

bulwark.name: Bulwark
bulwark.shortDesc: Sets the effects of Light Screen and Reflect.

mindwipe.name: Mindwipe
mindwipe.desc: Resets all of the target's stat stages to 0.
mindwipe.shortDesc: Resets all of the target's stat stages to 0.

mindtrap.name: Mindtrap
mindtrap.desc: If an opposing Pokemon switches out this turn, this move hits that Pokemon before it leaves the field, even if it was not the original target. If the user moves after an opponent using Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch, but not Baton Pass, it will hit that opponent before it leaves the field. Power doubles and no accuracy check is done if the user hits an opponent switching out, and the user's turn is over; if an opponent faints from this, the replacement Pokemon does not become active until the end of the turn.
mindtrap.shortDesc: If a foe is switching out, hits it at 2x power.

solarflare.name: Solar Flare
solarflare.shortDesc: Hits twice, 20% chance to burn per hit.

getlucky.name: Get Lucky
getlucky.desc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's critical hit ratio by 2 stages.
getlucky.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's crit ratio by 2.

dejavu.name: Deja-vu
dejavu.desc: The user disrupts space-time to discombobulate the foe. This move can't miss.
dejavu.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

brainfreeze.name: Brain Freeze
brainfreeze.desc: The user employs cryokinesis against the foe, potentially freezing it.

brainstorm.name: Brain Storm
brainstorm.desc: The user attacks using psychic force whilst brainstorming. This may raise the user's Sp. Atk stat.
brainstorm.shortDesc: 70% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.

necromagic.name: Necro Magic
necromagic.desc: The user saps HP from the foe with a cursed grasp, restoring HP equal to half the damage dealt.
necromagic.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.

clayhaymaker.name: Clay Haymaker
clayhaymaker.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.

newmoon.name: New Moon
newmoon.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes New Moon. The damage of Ghost/Dark-type attacks is multiplied by 1.35 and the damage of Fairy-type attacks is multiplied by 0.75 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Dark Rock. Fails if the current weather is New Moon.
newmoon.shortDesc: For 5 turns, darkness powers Ghost/Dark moves.

megatonslice.name: Megaton Slice
megatonslice.shortDesc: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.

lucky7s.name: Lucky 7s
lucky7s.shortDesc: +5 BP for each 7 in the user's stats.

drainlife.name: Drain Life
drainlife.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
drainlife.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.desc: An attack that hits first and makes the target flinch. It only works the first turn the user is in battle.
ambush.shortDesc: Hits first. First turn out only. 100% flinch chance.

yuckytongue.name: Yucky Tongue
yuckytongue.desc: The target is licked with a long tongue. It may paralyze the foe.

devilsdeed.name: Devil's Deed
devilsdeed.desc: The user performs a dark ritual that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.
devilsdeed.shortDesc: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1.

concertcrush.name: Concert Crush
concertcrush.desc: The user attempts to sing. Those hearing it feel heartbroken and their fighting spirit vanishes.
concertcrush.shortDesc: Lowers adjacent pokemon's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.

livewire.name: Livewire
livewire.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, with a chance to paralyze each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to five times before failing. Chance of paralysis is X/5 where X is the number of layers, chance is doubled in rain. Can be removed from the opposing side if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, is hit by Defog, or a grounded Electric or Ground type Pokemon switches in. Safeguard prevents the opposing party from being paralyzed on switch-in, but a substitute does not.
livewire.shortDesc: Can paralyze grounded foes on switch-in. Max 5 layers.

riftjump.name: Rift Jump
riftjump.desc: User switches out. The Pokémon switching in will gain +1 priority to any move on their first turn out.
riftjump.shortDesc: Switch out. Switch-in gains +1 prio for 1 turn.

shockbombs.name: Shock Bombs
shockbombs.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times.

rebootandretry.name: Reboot and Retry
rebootandretry.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.

severedsidearm.name: Severed Sidearm
severedsidearm.shortDesc: User's HP is 50% or less: +1 priority.

thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
thunderstorm.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Thunderstorm. The damage of Electric-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 during the effect. All non-Electric and Ground type Pokemon are damaged depending on their weakness to the Electric-type every other turn. Fails if the current weather is Thunderstorm.
thunderstorm.shortDesc: For 5 turns, a storm powers Electric moves.

thunderslash.name: Thunder Slash
thunderslash.desc: The foe is slashed with an electrified blade. Critical hits land easier.

infinityarrow.name: Infinity Arrow
infinityarrow.desc: Lightning, in the shape of arrows, shoots from the user's fur, leaving the foe paralyzed.

superheatedcrash.name: Superheated Crash
superheatedcrash.desc: If the user is hit by a contact move this turn before it can execute this move, the attacker is burned.
superheatedcrash.shortDesc: Burns on contact with the user before it moves.

pyropounce.name: Pyro Pounce
pyropounce.shortDesc: Bounces turn 1. Hits turn 2. 100% Chance to Burn.

infernalblade.name: Infernal Blade
infernalblade.desc: This move's type effectiveness against a Pokemon with the Fairy type is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is. Has a 10% chance to burn.
infernalblade.shortDesc: 10% chance to burn. Always super effective on Fairy.

searingslash.name: Searing Slash
searingslash.desc: The user rips through the foe with a hot blade. It may hit critically, and leave a burn.
searingslash.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio. 10% burn chance.

core.name: Core
core.desc: Bro heats up and burns everything. This also lowers the afflicted targets' Defense stat.

corrode.name: Corrode
corrode.desc: This move's type effectiveness against Steel is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is.

voidtentacle.name: Void Tentacle
voidtentacle.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is multiplied by 1.5 during Gravity's effect.

mourningkiss.name: Mourning Kiss
mourningkiss.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.

stickyterrain.name: Sticky Terrain
stickyterrain.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Sticky Terrain. During the effect, grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Normal type. Fails if the current terrain is Sticky Terrain.

barbedtackle.name: Barbed Tackle
barbedtackle.desc: The user rams into an opponent with the poisoned points on its body. This may also poison the target.

venomswipe.name: Venom Swipe
venomswipe.desc: The user swipes around its venomous tail aimlessly. This may poison struck targets.

bugblaster.name: Bug Blaster
bugblaster.desc: The user spews out a destructive bullet of glowing data. It may lower the target's Attack stat.
bugblaster.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's attack by 1.

poisonbubbles.name: Poison Bubbles
poisonbubbles.desc: The user spews bubbles that are covered in a poisonous substance that may poison the foe.

virusskater.name: Virus Skater
virusskater.desc: The user skates through digital data, hitting the foe with a nasty blow. Raises the user's Speed.
virusskater.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.

pagefault.name: Page Fault
pagefault.desc: The user somersaults, striking with its blades for several turns. The user ends up confused.
pagefault.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.

cablecrusher.name: Cable Crusher
cablecrusher.desc: The foe is strangled by the user and held in place 4 to 5 turns. There is no escape.
cablecrusher.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.

mudslide.name: Mudslide
mudslide.desc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
mudslide.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.

quakingthrust.name: Quaking Thrust
quakingthrust.desc: x1.5 power if the user moves before the target.
quakingthrust.shortDesc: x1.5 power if user moves before the target.

bitethedust.name: Bite the Dust
bitethedust.shortDesc: Heals for 1/8th max HP on hit.

subduction.name: Subduction
subduction.desc: Confuses the user. 100% chance to lower the foes's speed by 2 stages.
subduction.shortDesc: Confuses user. 100% to lower foe's speed by 2 stages.

bonesweep.name: Bone Sweep
bonesweep.desc: A large club is swung at the foe in a sweeping motion. This move hits the entire enemy team.
bonesweep.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.

anvilsmash.name: Anvil Smash
anvilsmash.desc: The user slams a hammer into the ground, creating a shockwave that hits every Pokémon.
anvilsmash.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dig.

nanorepair.name: Nanorepair
nanorepair.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. Defense is boosted by +1.
nanorepair.shortDesc: User heals 50% of its max HP; gets +1 Def.

runtimeexception.name: Runtime Exception
runtimeexception.desc: The user randomly uses Flare Blitz, Iron Head, Psychic, or Wild Charge.
runtimeexception.shortDesc: Randomly executes one of 4 powerful moves.

heavycleave.name: Heavy Cleave
heavycleave.shortDesc: 20% chance to lower foe(s) Defense by 1 stage.

simmertoss.name: Simmer Toss
simmertoss.shortDesc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.

metalwhip.name: Metal Whip
metalwhip.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
metalwhip.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.

mugencannon.name: Mugen Cannon
mugencannon.desc: The user blasts devastating energy waves from its cannons. It may lower the target's accuracy.
mugencannon.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.

lionsword.name: Lion Sword
lionsword.desc: The user slashes at the target with a magical sword. This attack never misses.
lionsword.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

trumpsword.name: Trump Sword
trumpsword.desc: In a flash the user summons sharp swords at the target. It strikes one to four times in a row.

rocketgrab.name: Rocket Grab
rocketgrab.desc: If an opposing Pokemon switches out this turn, this move hits that Pokemon before it leaves the field, even if it was not the original target. If the user moves after an opponent using Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch, but not Baton Pass, it will hit that opponent before it leaves the field. Switch is cancelled if the user hits an opponent switching out, and the user's turn is over; if an opponent faints from this, the replacement Pokemon does not become active until the end of the turn. Can't be used twice in a row.
rocketgrab.shortDesc: If a foe is switching out, cancels it. Cannot be used twice in a row.

metalcruncher.name: Metal Cruncher
metalcruncher.desc: Has an 85% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
metalcruncher.shortDesc: 70% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.

nailcrusher.name: Nail Crusher
nailcrusher.desc: The user crushes the target with its ginormous claws. It may lower the target's Defense.
nailcrusher.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's defense by 1.

duoscissorclaw.name: Duo Scissor Claw
duoscissorclaw.desc: A scissor-armed attack that can tear through diamond. It may lower the target's Defense.
duoscissorclaw.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's defense by 1.

nuclearpunch.name: Nuclear Punch
nuclearpunch.desc: The target is hit with a Chrome Digizoid hardened fist. It may raise the user's Attack.
nuclearpunch.shortDesc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.

kablow.name: Kablow!
kablow.desc: The user detonates to inflict damage on those around it. Rusty shrapnel is launched at the opponent.
kablow.shortDesc: The user faints. Sets Spikes and Toxic Spikes layer.

bullethammer.name: Bullet Hammer
bullethammer.desc: The user bats the opponent with a super-charged hammer. The recoil forces the user to rest.
bullethammer.shortDesc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally. User cannot move next turn.

boxin.name: Box In
boxin.desc: Prevents the user and the target from switching out. The user and the target can still switch out if either of them is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
boxin.shortDesc: Prevents both user and target from switching out.

jumpship.name: Jump Ship
jumpship.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP and heals its status condition, rounded half up. If Manacra, it swaps between plated and radial form.
jumpship.shortDesc: User is healed 1/2 max HP, status cured. If Manacra, swaps form.

spiritsiphon.name: Spirit Siphon
spiritsiphon.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
spiritsiphon.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.

vengefulpulse.name: Vengeful Pulse
vengefulpulse.shortDesc: 1.5x power if user is burn/poison/paralyzed. Transfers status.

deadsilence.name: Dead Silence
deadsilence.shortDesc: Perish song if user is not hit before moving.

misersmaul.name: Miser's Maul
misersmaul.shortDesc: Scatters coins if this KOes the target.

vanish.name: Vanish
vanish.desc: The user becomes nigh invisible using its ghostly body. This sharply raises its evasiveness.

darkshot.name: Dark Shot
darkshot.desc: The user launches a dark organic missile from its spine that always hits the foe.
darkshot.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.

deathnail.name: Death Nail
deathnail.desc: The user slashes at its foe with dark matter. This move obliterates any barrier such as Light Screen and Reflect.
deathnail.shortDesc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.

soulchopper.name: Soul Chopper
soulchopper.desc: The user annihilates the foe's soul with mighty cleaves. Always lands a critical hit.
soulchopper.shortDesc: Always results in a critical hit.

scarabssting.name: Scarab’s Sting
scarabssting.desc: Hits twice, with each hit having a 20% chance to paralyze the target. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.
scarabssting.shortDesc: Hits 2 times. Each hit has 20% chance to paralyze.

pheroblast.name: Pheroblast
pheroblast.shortDesc: Lowers user's Sp.Atk by 2 stages after use.

chitinsnare.name: Chitin Snare
chitinsnare.shortDesc: If succesful, hits again 2 turns later.

airslam.name: Air Slam
airslam.desc: The user spins towards the foe swinging its Holy Rod. It may leave the target with paralysis.

evilwing.name: Evil Wing
evilwing.desc: The user slashes the opponent with its wings at incredible speed. May leave the target paralyzed.

achillesheel.name: Achilles' Heel
achillesheel.desc: Always deals super effective damage, except against types that would normally be immune to it.

laserpulse.name: Laser Pulse
laserpulse.shortDesc: Type is random pick of Fire, Ice, and Electric

nailflick.name: Nail Flick
nailflick.desc: The user charges up a powerful flick of a sharp claw or nail. Critical hits land more easily.

boombubble.name: Boom Bubble
boombubble.desc: The user unleashes a powerful burst that may make the foe flinch.
boombubble.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

hammerthrow.name: Hammer Throw
hammerthrow.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times. Changes based on the weather.

darkmatter.name: Dark Matter
darkmatter.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

lunarcannon.name: Lunar Cannon
lunarcannon.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is New Moon, the move completes in one turn.
lunarcannon.shortDesc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in new moon.

webwrecker.name: Web Wrecker
webwrecker.desc: The user recklessly fires a powerful shot of destructive energy. Hits the entire field.
webwrecker.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dig.

hyperstinkshot.name: Hyper-Stink-Shot
hyperstinkshot.desc: The user shoots a bullet, made out of compressed gas. This move is unblockable.
hyperstinkshot.shortDesc: Breaks the target's protection for this turn.

compostbomber.name: Compost Bomber
compostbomber.desc: Poisonous clumps are scattered aimlessly. It's likely to poison those hit.

darknetwork.name: Dark Network
darknetwork.desc: A frenzy of virus-infested cables ravage the foe. The user's Sp. Atk harshly drops.
darknetwork.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.

cherryblast.name: Cherry Blast
cherryblast.desc: Forbidden fruit is shot at the opponent. Likely puts a curse on those hit.

omnihowl.name: Omni Howl
omnihowl.desc: The user hits everything around it with the destructive power of a prideful, explosive howl.
omnihowl.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.

permafrost.name: Permafrost
permafrost.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, with a chance to freeze each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to five times before failing. Chance of freeze is X/10 where X is the number of layers, chance is doubled in hail/snow. Can be removed from the opposing side if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, is hit by Defog, or a grounded Ice or Fire type Pokemon switches in. Safeguard prevents the opposing party from being frozen on switch-in, but a substitute does not.
permafrost.shortDesc: Can freeze grounded foes on switch-in. Max 5 layers.

subzerostorm.name: Subzero Storm
subzerostorm.shortDesc: Summons Snow. Icy Rock: x1.2 damage.

packin.name: Pack In
packin.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. Defense is boosted by +1 if Hail or Snow is active.
packin.shortDesc: User heals 50% of its max HP. +1 Def in Hail/Snow.

iceslash.name: Ice Slash
iceslash.desc: The target is slashed with a frozen claw or blade. Critical hits land more easily.

iceblast.name: Ice Blast
iceblast.desc: The target is hit with a sudden blast of freezing energy. This move is strong against Water types.
iceblast.shortDesc: 10% chance to freeze. Super effective on Water.

blueblaster.name: Blue Blaster
blueblaster.desc: Releases a stream of blue ice-like flames from its mouth, reducing the targets' Speed stat.
blueblaster.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's speed by 1.

icewolfclaw.name: Ice Wolf Claw
icewolfclaw.desc: The user launches ice-missiles in all directions. It hits two to five times in a row.

garurukick.name: Garuru-Kick
garurukick.desc: After kicking with an ice-covered paw, the user backflips to switch places with a party Pokémon.
garurukick.shortDesc: User switches out after damaging the target.

supremecannon.name: Supreme Cannon
supremecannon.desc: A powerful energy blast from the Garuru Cannon that hits all foes with a chance of freezing.
supremecannon.shortDesc: 25% chance to freeze. Hits adjacent foes.

bloomsday.name: Bloom's Day
bloomsday.desc: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.
bloomsday.shortDesc: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).

spudmortar.name: Spud Mortar
spudmortar.desc: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. If the user is holding a berry, this move will consume the berry and boost the move's basepower by 50%. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if another future move is already in effect for the target's position.
spudmortar.shortDesc: Hits two turns after being used. If holding berry, x1.5 BP, consumes berry.

omniblast.name: Omni Blast
omniblast.desc: The user unleashes a bolt of digital energy. Struck foes may get paralyzed, burned, or frozen.
omniblast.shortDesc: 50% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze target.

decapattack.name: Decap Attack
decapattack.desc: The user removes its head and launches it at the foe. This also damages the user.

hornbuster.name: Horn Buster
hornbuster.desc: Using its thruster, the user charges into the target. Raises the user's Speed stat.
hornbuster.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.

starlightblast.name: Starlight Blast
starlightblast.shortDesc: Heals 33%, transform into Tenkibo-Magical-Hero. If Tenkibo-Magical-Hero, 100BP Special move.

psychobarrage.name: Psycho Barrage
psychobarrage.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
psychobarrage.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.

focusedram.name: Focused Ram
focusedram.desc: The user centers their mind for a psy-charged headbutt. User takes recoil damage.

astralshot.name: Astral Shot
astralshot.desc: A shooting star is launched at the foe at an incredibly high speed.

cometshower.name: Comet Shower
cometshower.desc: Comets raining down on the user's surroundings. It may also make the targets flinch.
cometshower.shortDesc: 25% chance to make the target flinch.

bigbang.name: Big Bang
bigbang.desc: The Pokémon unleashes a burst of cosmic energy that hits all in battle, and may leave a status condition.
bigbang.shortDesc: 50% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze target.

shadowbound.name: Shadowbound
shadowbound.desc: Damage is calculated using the target's Special Attack stat, including stat stage changes. The user's Ability, item, and burn are used as normal.
shadowbound.shortDesc: Uses target's Sp.Attack stat in damage calculation.

phantasmalgust.name: Phantasmal Gust
phantasmalgust.shortDesc: 10% Chance to lower target(s) Sp. Atk by 1 stage
